message:
Refactor daemon command dispatch, expand SSH utility patterns, and harden audit E2E tests

- Restructure daemon.rs command dispatch with clearer state machine transitions between
  idle, compiling, and syncing states for more predictable daemon lifecycle management
- Expand SSH utility functions with connection pooling support, retry-with-backoff for
  transient network failures, and host key verification improvements
- Add new pattern matching utilities for file path filtering during remote sync operations
- Harden hook module with additional validation for pre/post compilation hook scripts
- Update audit E2E tests with more comprehensive coverage of daemon state transitions,
  concurrent compilation request handling, and error recovery scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
